facts.question: 关于“Abstract”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: Ø We have constructed a physical map of the human genome by using a panel of 83 whole genome radiation hybrids (the Stanford G3 panel) in conjunction with 10,478 sequence-tagged sites (STSs) derived from random genomic DNA sequences, previously mapped genetic markers, and expressed sequences.
facts.explanation: Ø We have constructed a physical map of the human genome by using a panel of 83 whole genome radiation hybrids (the Stanford G3 panel) in conjunction with 10,478 sequence-tagged sites (STSs) derived from random genomic DNA sequences, previously mapped genetic markers, and expressed sequences.

facts.question: 关于“Abstract”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？

facts.question: 根据知识库内容，下列哪个时间或数值是正确的？

facts.question: 关于“Abstract”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？

facts.explanation: Ø Analysis of 322 random cDNAs indicates that the map covers the vast majority of the human genome.

facts.question: 根据知识库内容，下列哪个时间或数值是正确的？

facts.question: 关于“测序数据处理2► illumina二代原始数据统计”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
“Sample”对应的内容是？
facts.explanation: ① Sample： 样本名称。

facts.question: “length(bp)”对应的内容是？
facts.explanation: ② length(bp)： 读段平均长度。

facts.question: “Reads”对应的内容是？
facts.explanation: ③ #Reads： 读段数量。

facts.question: “Bases”对应的内容是？
facts.explanation: ④ #Bases： 总碱基数量。

facts.question: “)”对应的内容是？
facts.answer: 分别计算 Phred 质量数值大于20、30的碱基占总体碱基的百分比
facts.explanation: ⑤ Q20(%)、Q30(%)： 分别计算 Phred 质量数值大于20、30的碱基占总体碱基的百分比。

facts.question: “)”对应的内容是？
facts.answer: 计算碱基G和C的数量总和占总的碱基数量的百分比
facts.explanation: ⑥ GC(%)： 计算碱基G和C的数量总和占总的碱基数量的百分比。

facts.question: “N(ppm)”对应的内容是？
facts.answer: 每百万碱基中测序无法判定的碱基N的数量
facts.explanation: ⑦ N(ppm)： 每百万碱基中测序无法判定的碱基N的数量。

facts.answer: ***对于“-qs/-qs2”参数选项*** 1. 正值表示 高质量分数（最大93），减少替代型（substitution）测序错误 2. 负值表示降低质量分数，增加测序错误 3. 如果设定为x，则错误率将是默认质量谱的1/(10^(x/10))。 art_illumina► 参数
facts.explanation: ***对于“-qs/-qs2”参数选项*** 1. 正值表示 高质量分数（最大93），减少替代型（substitution）测序错误 2. 负值表示降低质量分数，增加测序错误 3. 如果设定为x，则错误率将是默认质量谱的1/(10^(x/10))。 art_illumina► 参数

facts.explanation: （8）将替换错误率降低到默认配置文件的十分之一 art_illumina -i reference.fa -qs 10 -qs2 10 -l 50 -f 10 -p -m 500 -s 10 -sam -o reduce_error

facts.question: 关于“（1）单末端测序模拟”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: （9）关闭对包含未见核苷酸‘N’的基因组区间的屏蔽 art_illumina -ss HS20 -nf 0 -sam -i reference.fa -p -l 100 -f 20 -m 200 -s 10 -o paired_nomask
facts.explanation: （9）关闭对包含未见核苷酸‘N’的基因组区间的屏蔽 art_illumina -ss HS20 -nf 0 -sam -i reference.fa -p -l 100 -f 20 -m 200 -s 10 -o paired_nomask

facts.explanation: （10）屏蔽在150bp读长中出现>=5个'N'的基因组区间 art_illumina -ss HSXt -nf 5 -sam -i reference.fa -p -l 150 -f 20 -m 200 -s 10 -o paired_maskN5

facts.question: 关于“ART_PROFILER_ILLUMINA使用方法”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.explanation: ./art_profiler_illumina output_profile_name input_fastq_dir fastq_filename_extension [max_number_threads]

facts.question: 关于“ART_PROFILER_ILLUMINA使用方法”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 参数 output_profile_name： 程序生成的读段质量谱文档名称 input_fastq_dir： 输入的fastq文档所在目录（可以是压缩格式） fastq_filename_extension：测序文件扩展名（fq：fastq，fq.gz：压缩的fastq） max_number_threads：程序运行可以使用的线程数或CPU核数（默认：所有核）

entries.title: Abstract

facts.question: “21(1)”对应的内容是？
关于“Abstract”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: A systematic comparison of chloroplast genome assembly tools
facts.explanation: A systematic comparison of chloroplast genome assembly tools

facts.question: 关于“Abstract”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.explanation: Abstract Background

facts.question: 关于“Abstract”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【有关叶绿体的背景知识】 1. Chloroplasts are intracellular organelles that enable plants to conduct photosynthesis. 2. They arose through the symbiotic integration of a prokaryotic cell into an eukaryotic host cell and still contain their own genomes with distinct genomic information. 3. Plastid genomes accommodate essential genes and are regularly utilized in biotechnology or phylogenetics.
facts.explanation: 【有关叶绿体的背景知识】 1. Chloroplasts are intracellular organelles that enable plants to conduct photosynthesis. 2. They arose through the symbiotic integration of a prokaryotic cell into an eukaryotic host cell and still contain their own genomes with distinct genomic information. 3. Plastid genomes accommodate essential genes and are regularly utilized in biotechnology or phylogenetics.

facts.question: 关于“Abstract”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【有关组装工具的背景知识】 1. Different assemblers that are able to assess the plastid genome have been developed. 2. These assemblers often use data of whole genome sequencing experiments, which usually contain reads from the complete chloroplast genome.
facts.explanation: 【有关组装工具的背景知识】 1. Different assemblers that are able to assess the plastid genome have been developed. 2. These assemblers often use data of whole genome sequencing experiments, which usually contain reads from the complete chloroplast genome.

entries.title: Results

facts.question: “21(1)”对应的内容是？
关于“Results”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: A systematic comparison of chloroplast genome assembly tools
facts.explanation: A systematic comparison of chloroplast genome assembly tools

facts.question: 关于“Results”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【问题的提出】The performance of different assembly tools has never been systematically compared.
facts.explanation: 【问题的提出】The performance of different assembly tools has never been systematically compared.

facts.question: 根据知识库内容，下列哪个时间或数值是正确的？
facts.explanation: 【作者做了什么】Here, we present a benchmark of seven chloroplast assembly tools, capable of succeeding in more than 60% of known real data sets.

facts.question: 关于“Results”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【结果如何1】Our results show significant differences between the tested assemblers in terms of generating whole chloroplast genome sequences and computational requirements.
facts.explanation: 【结果如何1】Our results show significant differences between the tested assemblers in terms of generating whole chloroplast genome sequences and computational requirements.

facts.question: 关于“Results”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【结果如何2】The examination of 105 data sets from species with unknown plastid genomes leads to the assembly of 20 novel chloroplast genomes.
facts.explanation: 【结果如何2】The examination of 105 data sets from species with unknown plastid genomes leads to the assembly of 20 novel chloroplast genomes.

facts.question: 关于“Results”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.explanation: Conclusions

facts.question: 关于“Results”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【分享】We create docker images for each tested tool that are freely available for the scientific community and ensure reproducibility of the analyses.
facts.explanation: 【分享】We create docker images for each tested tool that are freely available for the scientific community and ensure reproducibility of the analyses.

facts.question: 关于“Results”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【用途】These containers allow the analysis and screening of data sets for chloroplast genomes using standard computational infrastructure.
facts.explanation: 【用途】These containers allow the analysis and screening of data sets for chloroplast genomes using standard computational infrastructure.

facts.question: 关于“Results”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【结论和意义】Thus, large scale screening for chloroplasts within genomic sequencing data is feasible.
facts.explanation: 【结论和意义】Thus, large scale screening for chloroplasts within genomic sequencing data is feasible.

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.explanation: Abstract

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【背景】Genome assembly using long reads, produced by advanced sequencing technologies
facts.explanation: 【背景】Genome assembly using long reads, produced by advanced sequencing technologies

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: (e.g., PacBio, Nanopore), has gained widespread popularity due to their ability to span larger genomic regions.
facts.explanation: (e.g., PacBio, Nanopore), has gained widespread popularity due to their ability to span larger genomic regions.

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【问题】However, a crucial step in assembling these reads into a complete genome is detecting overlaps between them- a process that is time-consuming and thus challenging.
facts.explanation: 【问题】However, a crucial step in assembling these reads into a complete genome is detecting overlaps between them- a process that is time-consuming and thus challenging.

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【方法】To address the challenge of slow runtime in detecting overlaps for long-read genome assembly, we introduce a novel method that significantly expedites overlap detection while maintaining accuracy.
facts.explanation: 【方法】To address the challenge of slow runtime in detecting overlaps for long-read genome assembly, we introduce a novel method that significantly expedites overlap detection while maintaining accuracy.

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？

entries.title: a two-hash table strategy
entries.summary: Comput Biol Chem. 2025 Dec:119:108576. doi: 10.1016/j.compbiolchem.2025.108576.

facts.question: “Dec”对应的内容是？
facts.explanation: Comput Biol Chem. 2025 Dec:119:108576. doi: 10.1016/j.compbiolchem.2025.108576.

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: Accelerating long-read overlap detection for genome assembly with a two-hash table strategy
facts.explanation: Accelerating long-read overlap detection for genome assembly with a two-hash table strategy

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【方法：创新】 1) In addition to the traditional hash table, we construct a second hash table with a different k mer size in an efficient way.
facts.explanation: 【方法：创新】 1) In addition to the traditional hash table, we construct a second hash table with a different k mer size in an efficient way.

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: This table is used to refine candidate detection and also overlap region estimation while the traditional first hash table is utilized to find anchors within the estimated overlap region to audit candidates and determine the exact candidate region. 3) A two-step strategy is employed to reduce computational overhead of candidate auditing.
facts.explanation: This table is used to refine candidate detection and also overlap region estimation while the traditional first hash table is utilized to find anchors within the estimated overlap region to audit candidates and determine the exact candidate region. 3) A two-step strategy is employed to reduce computational overhead of candidate auditing.

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: First, we estimate the overlap region, and then we audit candidate and confirm the overlap region using a dynamic programming and the first hash table.
facts.explanation: First, we estimate the overlap region, and then we audit candidate and confirm the overlap region using a dynamic programming and the first hash table.

facts.question: 关于“a two-hash table strategy”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 【结果】Comparative results demonstrate that the proposed overlap detector significantly improves both the assembly quality and speed by efficiently detecting overlapping reads, enabling faster and more comprehensive genome assemblies.
facts.explanation: 【结果】Comparative results demonstrate that the proposed overlap detector significantly improves both the assembly quality and speed by efficiently detecting overlapping reads, enabling faster and more comprehensive genome assemblies.

facts.question: 关于“Bowtie2”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 说，其内存占用量通常约为3.2GB。 3. Bowtie 2支持带缺口的（gap）、局部的（local）和配对末端比对等多种模式；支持多线程，这样比
facts.explanation: 说，其内存占用量通常约为3.2GB。 3. Bowtie 2支持带缺口的（gap）、局部的（local）和配对末端比对等多种模式；支持多线程，这样比

facts.question: 关于“Bowtie2”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 对速度会更快；命令行可以运行于Windows、Mac OS X 、Linux 、BSD等多种操作系统。 4. Bowtie2输出SAM格式结果文件，该格式也是许多其他工具可以操作的，如SAMtools、GATK等。 5. entries.title: 基因组标准注释过程 ► 原核生物基因组
entries.summary: 完整基因组的最低标准 1. 结构RNA：5S、16S、23S ：每个至少有一个长度合适的拷贝 2. tRNA：每个氨基酸至少有一个拷贝 3. 蛋白质编码基因计数除以基因组长度接近 1 4. 没有基因完全包含在相同链或相反链上的另一个基因中

facts.question: 关于“基因组标准注释过程 ► 原核生物基因组”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 完整基因组的最低标准 1. 结构RNA：5S、16S、23S ：每个至少有一个长度合适的拷贝 2. tRNA：每个氨基酸至少有一个拷贝 3. 蛋白质编码基因计数除以基因组长度接近 1 4. 没有基因完全包含在相同链或相反链上的另一个基因中 5. 无部分特征（不完整） 6. 每个异常都必须得到解释和记录
facts.explanation: 完整基因组的最低标准 1. 结构RNA：5S、16S、23S ：每个至少有一个长度合适的拷贝 2. tRNA：每个氨基酸至少有一个拷贝 3. 蛋白质编码基因计数除以基因组长度接近 1 4. 没有基因完全包含在相同链或相反链上的另一个基因中 5. 无部分特征（不完整） 6. 每个异常都必须得到解释和记录。

facts.question: 关于“基于同源搜索的基因预测 ► ④ 取GMS1在Ap基因组中的高相似区域”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.explanation: #!/bin/bash

facts.question: 关于“基于同源搜索的基因预测 ► ④ 取GMS1在Ap基因组中的高相似区域”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: # 利用awk指令解析blast输出7， 取GMS1在目标基因组中的高相似区域（extract_seq.sh）
facts.explanation: # 利用awk指令解析blast输出7， 取GMS1在目标基因组中的高相似区域（extract_seq.sh）

facts.question: 关于“基于同源搜索的基因预测 ► ④ 取GMS1在Ap基因组中的高相似区域”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: # 命令行示例：./extract_seq.sh Ap_tblastn_results.outfmt7 Ap_gDNA3.fa Ap_HSP.fa awk 'BEGIN { FS=OFS="\t" } /^[^#]/ { print $1,$2,$9,$10 }' $1 | { read -r query subject s_start s_end echo "查询蛋白质（$query）命中基因组序列（$subject）区域——起始: $s_start, 终止: $s_end" if [ $s_start -lt $s_end ]; then echo "起始（$s_start） 小于 终止（$s_end），故命中正链（+）" samtools faidx $2 $subject:$s_start-$s_end -o $3 else strand="-i" # samtools faidx指令指定负链的参数设置 echo "起始（$s_start） 大于 终止（$s_end），故命中负链（-）" samtools faidx $2 $subject:$s_end-$s_start $strand -o $3 fi cat $3 # 查看序列
facts.explanation: # 命令行示例：./extract_seq.sh Ap_tblastn_results.outfmt7 Ap_gDNA3.fa Ap_HSP.fa awk 'BEGIN { FS=OFS="\t" } /^[^#]/ { print $1,$2,$9,$10 }' $1 | { read -r query subject s_start s_end echo "查询蛋白质（$query）命中基因组序列（$subject）区域——起始: $s_start, 终止: $s_end" if [ $s_start -lt $s_end ]; then echo "起始（$s_start） 小于 终止（$s_end），故命中正链（+）" samtools faidx $2 $subject:$s_start-$s_end -o $3 else strand="-i" # samtools faidx指令指定负链的参数设置 echo "起始（$s_start） 大于 终止（$s_end），故命中负链（-）" samtools faidx $2 $subject:$s_end-$s_start $strand -o $3 fi cat $3 # 查看序列

facts.question: 关于“基于同源搜索的基因预测 ► ④ 取GMS1在Ap基因组中的高相似区域”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.explanation: } put extract_seq.sh chmod +x extract_seq.sh

facts.question: 关于“基于同源搜索的基因预测 ► ④ 取GMS1在Ap基因组中的高相似区域 ext”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？

facts.explanation: # 并向上下游延伸指定长度区域

facts.question: 根据知识库内容，下列哪个时间或数值是正确的？
facts.explanation: # 命令行示例：./extract_seq2.sh Ap_tblastn_results.outfmt7 Ap_gDNA3.fa Ap_HSP_ext1kb.fa 1000 1000 awk 'BEGIN { FS=OFS="\t" } /^[^#]/ { print $1,$2,$9,$10 }' $1 | { read -r query subject s_start s_end echo "查询蛋白质（$query）命中基因组序列（$subject）区域——起始: $s_start, 终止: $s_end" echo "同时向上游延伸：$4，下游延伸：$5" if [ $s_start -lt $s_end ]; then echo "起始（$s_start） 小于 终止（$s_end），故命中正链（+）" s_start2=$(($s_start-$4)) && s_end2=$(($s_end+$5)) samtools faidx $2 $subject:$s_start-$s_end -o $3 else strand="-i" # samtools faidx指令指定负链的参数设置 echo "起始（$s_start） 大于 终止（$s_end），故命中正链（-）" s_start2=$(($s_start+$4)) && s_end2=$(($s_end-$5)) samtools faidx $2 $subject:$s_end-$s_start $strand -o $3 fi cat $3 # 查看序列

facts.question: “命中正链”对应的内容是？
facts.explanation: 命中正链：← s_start...HSP...s_end→ 命中负链：← s_end...HSP...s_start→

entries.title: 可能的转录因子的靶基因研究案例（CT45A1）► 计算思路
entries.summary: 1. 通过Motif分析找出这些序列之间的共同点 2. 排除掉已知TFBSs 3. 余下的最有可能是CT45A1的DNA结合位点 4. 人工合成该寡核苷酸片段，进行蛋白-DNA结合实验（EMSA），确认到底是哪一个？ 5. 在全基因组中扫

facts.question: 关于“可能的转录因子的靶基因研究案例（CT45A1）► 计算思路”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 1. 通过Motif分析找出这些序列之间的共同点 2. 排除掉已知TFBSs 3. 余下的最有可能是CT45A1的DNA结合位点 4. 人工合成该寡核苷酸片段，进行蛋白-DNA结合实验（EMSA），确认到底是哪一个？ 5. 在全基因组中扫 该共同Motif，计算鉴别CT45A1所有可能的结合靶点【下游就可能
facts.explanation: 1. 通过Motif分析找出这些序列之间的共同点 2. 排除掉已知TFBSs 3. 余下的最有可能是CT45A1的DNA结合位点 4. 人工合成该寡核苷酸片段，进行蛋白-DNA结合实验（EMSA），确认到底是哪一个？ 5. 在全基因组中扫 该共同Motif，计算鉴别CT45A1所有可能的结合靶点【下游就可能

entries.summary: 节点标志 gene node：某物种基因本身（叶子）节点 speciation node：不同物种形成节点→Orthologues duplication node：某物种发生基因复制事件→Paralogues ambiguous node

facts.question: 关于“Ensembl ► Human CYCS”，下列哪项表述与知识库一致？
facts.answer: 节点标志 gene node：某物种基因本身（叶子）节点 speciation node：不同物种形成节点→Orthologues duplication node：某物种发生基因复制事件→Paralogues ambiguous node：模糊节点 gene split event：基因分裂事件→一个基因组分裂成几个碎片
facts.explanation: 节点标志 gene node：某物种基因本身（叶子）节点 speciation node：不同物种形成节点→Orthologues duplication node：某物种发生基因复制事件→Paralogues ambiguous node：模糊节点 gene split event：基因分裂事件→一个基因组分裂成几个碎片

entries.summary: Orthologue 类型 描述 1:1 一对物种AB的每个物种中仅仅发现一个基因拷贝 1:many 物种A中的一个基因与物种B中的多个基因同源（B-基因复制）

facts.question: “1”对应的内容是？
facts.answer: 1 一对物种AB的每个物种中仅仅发现一个基因拷贝 1:many 物种A中的一个基因与物种B中的多个基因同源（B-基因复制）
facts.explanation: Orthologue 类型 描述 1:1 一对物种AB的每个物种中仅仅发现一个基因拷贝 1:many 物种A中的一个基因与物种B中的多个基因同源（B-基因复制）

facts.question: “Many”对应的内容是？
facts.answer: many 一对物种AB的每个物种中均存在当前基因的多个同源体（AB-基因复制）
